rows: Important Dates Application Begin : 08/02/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 11/03/2026 upto 09 PM Last Date Online Payment : 11/03/2026 Correction Date : 12-14 March 2026 NEET UG 2025 Exam Date : 03/05/2026 (Cancelled) Update Exam City Details : 15-21 May 2026 Fee Refund Bank Details Update : 22-27 May 2026 NEET UG 2025 Re Exam Date : 21/06/2026 Exam City Available : As per Schedule Admit Card Available : Before Exam Answer Key Available : As per Schedule Result Declared : June 2026

NEET UG 2026 Age Limit Minimum Age : 17 Years Maximum Age : No Limit born on or before 31.12.2009 Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.

text_sections.content: Aadhar Card is Compulsory in All India NTA NEET 2026 Examination | Instruction Of Photo : Candidate Live Photo & Clear Passport Size and 4x6 Size Photo (Visible Including Ears) with White | Background and Also Enter Your Candidates Name and Photo Taken Date after 01/01/2026 | For More Details Kindly SEE NEET UG 2026 Notification
